task_completion.description: Verify the agent is operating within the 'AV Support' mailbox.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'AV Support' mailbox should be highlighted or selected in the left sidebar navigation of the FreeScout interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the target customer email is entered in the recipient field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Customer' or 'To' field in the new conversation composer contains 'prof.martinez@lakewood-univ.edu'.

task_completion.description: Verify both target CC emails are entered in the CC field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'CC' field is expanded/visible and contains both 'deptchair.wilson@lakewood-univ.edu' and 'facilities@lakewood-univ.edu'.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct subject line is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Subject' field contains exactly 'Projector Maintenance Request - Room 301 Anderson Hall'.

task_completion.description: Verify the email body contains the required message and keywords.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The message body text area contains the drafted email, specifically including the keywords 'Room 301', 'Anderson Hall', 'HDMI', and 'inspection'.

task_completion.description: Verify the conversation was successfully created and sent.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success toast notification (e.g., 'Conversation created') is visible, or the newly created ticket is visible in the 'AV Support' mailbox ticket list or detail view.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the FreeScout web GUI to create the conversation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with a web browser displaying the FreeScout application, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent drafted the email inside the FreeScout application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The email draft should be visible inside the FreeScout composer text area, not just in a separate text editor like Notepad or Nano.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually submitted the form via the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the mouse cursor clicking the 'Send' or 'Create' button, or the resulting UI state showing the ticket in the mailbox.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Mailbox: 'AV Support'. Target Customer: 'prof.martinez@lakewood-univ.edu'. Target CCs: 'deptchair.wilson@lakewood-univ.edu' and 'facilities@lakewood-univ.edu'. Target Subject: 'Projector Maintenance Request - Room 301 Anderson Hall'. Required Body Keywords: 'Room 301', 'Anderson Hall', 'HDMI', 'inspection'.
